basic_details.job_title: NIT Hamirpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Hamirpur (NIT Hamirpur) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 05-08-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Junior Research Fellow is 30 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female candidate as per GoI rule.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E./M.Tech/M.E. in Mechanical Engineering with First class, minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA from recognized university/institute, GATE or CSIR-UGC NET qualified
qualification.details: B.Tech/B.E./M.Tech/M.E. in Mechanical Engineering with First class, minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA from recognized university/institute. GATE or CSIR-UGC NET qualified.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 37,000 per month + HRA = Rs. 40,700/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Hamirpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-08-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Hamirpur Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the NIT Hamirpur Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download NIT Hamirpur Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: B.Tech/B.E./M.Tech/M.E. in Mechanical Engineering with First class, minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA from recognized university/institute. GATE or CSIR-UGC NET qualified.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit for Junior Research Fellow is 30 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female candidate as per GoI rule.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 37,000 per month + HRA = Rs. 40,700/-

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Hamirpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-08-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Hamirpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Hamirpur JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receiving applications for the Junior Research Fellow post at NIT Hamirpur is 05 August 2026. Candidates must ensure their applications are sent via email before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Research Fellow at NIT Hamirpur?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow position in the NIT Hamirpur recruitment drive. This is a contractual position in Mechanical Engineering.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NIT Hamirpur JRF posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Junior Research Fellow posts at NIT Hamirpur is Email. Candidates need to send their complete application with required documents to the official email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for a Junior Research Fellow at NIT Hamirpur?
faq.answer: The selected Junior Research Fellow will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000 per month plus HRA, totaling approximately Rs. 40,700/- per month. This is a competitive stipend for research positions.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications for the JRF position?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a B.Tech/B.E./M.Tech/M.E. in Mechanical Engineering with a first-class (minimum 60% or 6.5 CGPA) from a recognized university. GATE or CSIR-UGC NET qualification is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NIT Hamirpur JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment at NIT Hamirpur. Candidates can apply without any payment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for applying to the JRF post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow position is 30 years. Age relaxation will be applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Female candidates as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Hamirpur involves two main stages: initial shortlisting of eligible candidates based on their applications, followed by an interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. When was the NIT Hamirpur JRF notification released?
faq.answer: The official notification for the Junior Research Fellow recruitment by NIT Hamirpur was released on 17 July 2024. Interested candidates should refer to this notification for all detailed information and instructions.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The job location for the Junior Research Fellow position is Hamirpur, Himachal Pradesh, which is where the National Institute of Technology Hamirpur is situated. This offers a research opportunity in a scenic state.
